analyses.explanation: The login test failed because after submitting valid credentials, the page did not navigate to the dashboard. Instead it stayed on the login page, which typically indicates the credentials were rejected by the server or there was a session/cookie issue.
analyses.rootCause: The test password field appears to have been cleared before submission, or the demo site credentials were temporarily changed. The page HTML shows an 'Invalid credentials' error alert is visible, confirming the login POST request returned a failure response.
analyses.suggestedFix: 1. Verify credentials are still valid: navigate manually to https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com and try Admin/admin123. 2. Add a waitForLoadState('networkidle') after click to ensure the form submission completes. 3. Add a waitForSelector on the error or success element before asserting URL.
analyses.testName: TC_LOGIN_001 — Valid login with correct username and password
analyses.originalError:
Error: expect(received).toHaveURL(expected)
Expected pattern: /dashboard/
Received string: "https://opensource-demo.orangehrmlive.com/web/index.php/auth/login"

analyses.explanation: The dashboard widget test failed because the 'Time at Work' element was not found on the page within the default timeout. This suggests either the dashboard took too long to render or the selector has changed.
analyses.rootCause: The demo OrangeHRM site occasionally experiences latency spikes. The widget text 'Time at Work' may have been rendered inside a lazy-loaded component that hadn't appeared within Playwright's 30 second timeout.
analyses.suggestedFix: 1. Increase timeout for this specific test to 60000ms. 2. Add explicit await page.waitForLoadState('networkidle') after login redirect. 3. Use a more specific selector like .oxd-grid-item instead of text-based locator to avoid i18n issues.
analyses.testName: TC_DASH_003 — Time at Work widget is present
analyses.originalError:
Error: locator.toBeVisible: Error: strict mode violation: locator('text=Time at Work') resolved to 0 elements
 at widgetLoading.spec.js:22:5
